# Heater

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Heater;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Heater { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
heating, warmth, comfort, fire, stove, electric, electronics, amenities

## Categories
home, devices, travel

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/heater)
